title: globularia liouvillei subsp. greuteri
intro: Globularia liouvillei subsp. greuteri, also known as a subspecies of the globe daisy, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Globularia liouvillei subsp. greuteri include reducing inflammation, protecting against cell damage, and potentially aiding in the management of conditions such as arthritis and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
